description:
Phase 3 implements the entire post-worker-exit orchestration pipeline for current-branch workers: commit attribution, per-worker review, coordinator triage, remediation, and the `verified` terminal state.

## Goals

1. Split `inspectWorkerRuntime` post-exit orchestration into mode-specific paths
2. Implement `verifyCurrentBranchWorker` with idempotency and orchestration-lock deduplication
3. Build LLM-readable attribution evidence packs from beadwork comments/history + git
4. Implement per-worker review using agent-driven inspection (not truncated diff bundles)
5. Implement coordinator review triage (`fix` / `file` / `reject`)
6. Implement current-branch remediation relaunch (cap: 2 attempts)
7. Mark successful workers `verified`; route failures to `attention`
8. Skip rebase/merge-back/containment/worktree-cleanup for current-branch

## Key Design Constraints

- Per-worker review is enabled by default for current-branch; skip only when config explicitly disables
- Reviewer receives commit SHAs + ticket context, uses own tools to inspect — NOT a truncated patch bundle
- Attribution is LLM work from an evidence pack: ticket context, comments/history, candidate commits after `launchHead`, ancestry checks, logs/artifacts
- Do NOT build a deterministic attribution parser or require rigid handoff-comment format
- Verification must be idempotent: return immediately for already-verified workers, avoid duplicate remediation launches, check for existing follow-up tasks before creating new ones
- Branch-drift detection at verification time: confirm checkout still on recorded `branchName`, confirm attributed SHAs are ancestors of HEAD via `git merge-base --is-ancestor`
- `verified` means: exited + ticket closed + commits discoverable + review passed + no unresolved `fix` findings
- Blocked workers route to `attention`, not a new status

## Files likely affected

- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/orchestrator.ts` — mode-branched post-exit flow
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/types.ts` — evidence pack type, review artifact updates
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/handoff.ts` — remediation prompts
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/registry.ts` — `verified` state persistence
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/` — verification regression suite

## Definition of Done

- Closed-ticket exited current-branch workers trigger verification, not worktree landing
- Attribution evidence packs are built and readable
- Per-worker review runs for each completion, centered on ticket-attributed commits
- Coordinator triages all findings; `fix` triggers remediation, `file` creates follow-up, `reject` discards
- 2-attempt remediation cap; beyond that → `attention`
- Workers reach `verified` on success
- No rebase/merge-back/containment/cleanup in current-branch path
- Idempotent across polls/restarts
- Worktree landing path preserved
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Phase 3: Current-branch verification — attribution, review, triage, remediation
